name: vitalis-fhir-1177
description: Vitalis Hackathon 2026 — FHIR R4 facade over 1177.se with agentic chat

scripts.prod: cd fhir-proxy && mvn -DskipTests package && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names 'java,agent' 'java -jar target/fhir-proxy-1177.jar' 'cd ../agent && npm run start'
scripts.install:all: cd fhir-proxy/ui && npm install && cd ../../agent && npm install
